extraction.one_line_summary: LUTSENKO Alexey won the 16.4km time trial, catching two riders on course, missing yellow by one second to PÖSTLBERGER Lukas.
tactical_patterns: VINGEGAARD Jonas first sub-22min, dominant first half but all riders lost time to him second half showing pacing vulnerability.
MCNULTY Brandon 4.5sec up at 7.5km time check, held form better than climber-specialists on technical second half.
THOMAS Geraint fastest at intermediate but lost 23sec to LUTSENKO in final 8.9km, suggesting pacing miscalculation or technical weakness.
LUTSENKO caught both two-minute men on course, only rider shown doing so, revealing exceptional pacing strategy for 16km effort.

rider_signals.LUTSENKO Alexey: positive: Historically non-spectacular TT rider winning against world-class field suggests major form peak timing for stage races.
rider_signals.PÖSTLBERGER Lukas: positive: Defending yellow by 1sec against PORTE/THOMAS/KELDERMAN on lumpy technical TT reveals unexpected time trial resilience for non-specialist.
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: positive: First sub-22min and dominated first half, indicating climbing TT strength but potential pacing refinement needed.
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: negative: Fastest intermediate but faded 23sec to LUTSENKO on technical finish, 2sec slower than teammate PORTE suggests form concerns.
rider_signals.MCNULTY Brandon: positive: 8th place at 24 years old, 4.5sec up at intermediate sustained better than climbers shows emerging TT strength.
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: negative: 40sec down at 7.5km time check in TT specialty reveals continued struggle two years post-injury.
rider_signals.PORTE Richie: neutral: Beat teammate THOMAS by 2sec despite lower intermediate split, showing superior technical execution on twisty finale.
rider_signals.ASGREEN Kasper: neutral: Pre-race favorite for yellow finished 3rd GC, underperformed expectations on lumpy technical course favoring his skillset.
